product_depth.justification: All 6 core sections present with tender-management-specific content. APMP/Shipley methodology with color team review definitions. Compliance-first and win-theme-driven generator approaches. Goes beyond minimum with color team readiness verification table and bid/no-bid checklist.

functionality.justification: Criteria names (compliance_coverage, response_completeness, win_theme_clarity, submission_readiness) match index skill exactly. All 4 criteria have complete 0-5 anchor tables. APMP/Shipley, color team reviews, bid/no-bid framework present. Anti-patterns reference correct criteria.

visual_design.justification: Section formatting follows established domain skill pattern. Tables consistent with harness-sales SKILL.md. Color team table adds domain-specific value.

code_quality.justification: YAML frontmatter valid with quoted description. Security anti-patterns present (Pricing Leak, Competitive Intel Misuse). Security checks in RFP response checklist. No broken references.

contract_checks.evidence: All 6 sections present with tender-specific content including color team definitions, compliance verification, and bid/no-bid framework.
4 criteria with complete 0-5 anchor tables: compliance_coverage, response_completeness, win_theme_clarity, submission_readiness.
APMP/Shipley Capture Management, Agile Proposal Development, Color Team Review Process, Bid/No-Bid Decision Framework, and BAFO methodology in table.
YAML frontmatter valid. Security anti-patterns: Pricing Leak and Competitive Intel Misuse. Security in checklists.

feature_evidence.reason: All 6 verification steps pass: file exists, 6 core sections, 4 criteria with 0-5 anchors, APMP/Shipley + capture management + color teams, anti-patterns include non-compliant/generic win themes/missed deadline, security in checklists.

internal_consistency.justification: Criteria names match index skill. Color team definitions align with APMP/Shipley standards. Anti-pattern penalties reference correct criteria.

intentionality.justification: Color team review process follows industry-standard pink/red/gold/white sequence. Bid/no-bid framework reflects real capture management practice. Compliance-first methodology grounded in government procurement reality.

craft.justification: 6-section structure follows established pattern. Tables consistent. Anchors progress logically from absent to exemplary.

fitness_for_purpose.justification: A proposal manager could use these checklists and criteria to evaluate RFP response quality. Color team gate criteria are actionable.
